page: Microsoft Azure ND96isr_H100_v5 is an isolated virtual machine belonging to the NDSH100v5 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, this server features 96 dedicated vCPUs and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 1900.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 19.79 GB of RAM per core.

The server includes eight integrated GPUs and features 31769 GB of local storage. It is premium storage capable and supports Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) networking, enabling high-throughput, low-latency communication across nodes.

Given the massive scale of its hardware resources, including eight GPUs, substantial local storage, and high memory density, this server represents a premium, high-density hardware class. It is designed for resource-intensive workloads such as large-scale machine learning, deep learning training, high-performance computing, and complex data science jobs that require massive parallel processing and high-speed interconnectivity.
description: Microsoft Azure ND96isr_H100_v5 is an isolated virtual machine from the NDSH100v5 family, designed for high-performance computing and parallel processing. Built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor, it features 96 dedicated vCPUs managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 1900.0 GB of system memory, yielding 19.79 GB of RAM per core, alongside eight integrated GPUs. For storage and connectivity, the server provides 31769 GB of local storage, supports premium storage, and is RDMA-capable for low-latency networking. This configuration represents a highly dense, premium hardware class optimized for resource-intensive workloads. It is best suited for large-scale machine learning model training, deep learning, high-performance computing, and advanced data science operations requiring massive parallel compute power and high-speed node communication.

tagline: An isolated, high-density GPU server featuring ninety-six dedicated vCPUs, massive system memory, and extensive local storage for parallel computing workloads.
